{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323042026F3FEF60AE2A3658F7F51"}"},"total":332},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7219905256786952971","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺不错，还挺喜欢主角那种人设的。❤"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1681015267,"group_id":"7031053717688290341","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxHIAX7qphZJzfVBOw7sUZM=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"567812944837767","user_name":"用户56781294"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"567812944837767","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7031053717688290341","book_info":{"abstract":"意外死亡的叶玄来到地府轮回转世投胎。“砰，恭喜转世者抽到神级转世大礼包！”叶玄还在发愣，一道道声音已经在自己脑海中响起。“恭喜抽到神级天赋，混沌神体”。“恭喜抽到顶级身世，武皇之子。”“恭喜抽到上古神器，神剑龙渊。”叶玄听着脑海中的声音，整个人呆若木鸡。“嗡，转世轮回通道开启……”刚进入通道，叶玄就听到脑海中的声音再次响起，“恭喜转世者，解锁神级礼包隐藏福利，系统绑定。”
